text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Less than one month remains until the Arima
Kinen. There's just one problem...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's running is stiff. Everything about
her just seems rigid. Now that the showdown is
almost here, it seems she's feeling the pressure.
choice_data_list: Let's take a couple deep breaths to relax.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Breathe in. Breathe out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're almost out of track time, and the other
Umamusume are starting to wrap things up. I need
to figure something out fast...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: BREATHE IIIN!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And BREATHE OOOUT!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come on, Hayahide! Do it with me! IIIN!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's a fine line between being helpful and obnoxious, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Lift your head up, Hayahide. Slouching like that
makes it look bigger than usual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?! My head's perfectly—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There, your back just straightened out. That
should make it easier for you to breathe.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. I didn't come here for thanks. I only
said it because she's hogging the track, and
everyone's waiting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Your time slot's almost over, and you two are just
standing around like you own the place.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, Taishin! You're the one who was all,
"Oh no, let's go see what's wrong with Hayahide!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up. I never said that...
choice_data_list: You're lucky to have such good friends.
You're lucky to have such good friends.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I really am. They're almost too good for me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we all go for one more lap and
end today's training with a bang?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come on you guys! Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Deeerbyyy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I wonder if she noticed the Derby's over already...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be Ticket if she didn't shout random
things all the time. Besides, her energy always
cheers me up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm so grateful to have met you two.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, okay, that's very sweet and everything.
Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You gonna run or what?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, count me in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forgetting all about their agreement to run just
one lap, the three friends keep going until time
runs out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the tension seems to melt from Biwa
Hayahide's shoulders, and her form looks great
once more.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HA-YA-HI-DE!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please... We're using names as a running
chant now?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: TIII-CKET! TAAAI-SHIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Hey, it's not bad! Besides, the act of
vocalizing has a demonstrable effect on gross
motor movements.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But more than that, shouting your names really
motivates me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you're losing your mind too...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So? Are we gonna catch up to the wild child or
what?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide, Winning Ticket, and Narita
Taishin keep racing around the track without a
care in the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her friends' shouts of encouragement
have a positive effect on Hayahide, who can't
stop grinning.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Did I do that right? I could've sworn that was the
right time to yell...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft! Hahaha! Nah, that was perfect. Come on,
let's run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey! No fair, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Mind if I go too, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Go for it! Get that W!
Go for it! Get that W!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Roger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide chases after Winning Ticket and
Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ends up crossing the finish line first despite
their head start.
